enriched_points.expanded_content: FETs are pivotal in 2D materials research, enabling the exploration of electronic properties and device functionality through precise control over charge transport.
Conductivity measurements assess the ease of electron flow in 2D materials, crucial for determining their suitability in electronic applications and optimizing device performance.
Charge carrier mobility indicates how quickly carriers move through a material, influencing the efficiency of FETs and the overall performance of 2D electronic devices.
